entries.title: Page edit preview actions.
entries.notes: Capture the Page edit header with the Preview group showing the separate `Changes` and `Live page` actions.
entries.useCase: An editor chooses between a temporary unsaved preview and the saved public page.

entries.title: Signed unsaved page preview.
entries.notes: Capture a valid signed preview URL generated from an unsaved Page edit snapshot. Do not commit real signed URLs or snapshot tokens.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews temporary Page changes before saving them.

entries.title: Expired preview error.
entries.notes: Capture the safe error state for an expired or missing preview snapshot without exposing cache keys or internal exception details.
entries.useCase: An editor understands that an old temporary preview link has expired.
